# Architech

> Architech is an Auckland-based growth studio that builds commission-free direct booking engines and produces high-impact social video content for independent hospitality brands across New Zealand and the Pacific.

Tagline: "We structure code. We film experiences."

## What we do

- Commission-free booking/ordering engines so venues stop paying 15-20% to OTAs and aggregators (Booking.com, Expedia, UberEats)
- Fast, mobile-optimized websites (<1s page load) with local Maps SEO and Google Profile optimization
- High-impact social content: POV-styled Reels and TikToks, influencer-style review shoots, organic video management
- POS hardware integration and custom Looker dashboards (Premium tier)

## Packages

- **Basic — The Footprint**: $690 NZD setup + $69/mo. 1-page mobile site, local Maps SEO, Google Profile optimization, secure hosting.
- **Mid — The Engine** (most popular): $1,990 NZD setup + $199/mo. Adds commission-free booking/ordering engine, automated review generation, and a dedicated on-site content shoot (3 Reels/TikToks). Partial barter eligible.
- **Premium — The Command Centre**: $4,990 NZD setup + $1,490/mo. Adds POS integration, custom Looker dashboard, and a monthly content retainer (8 Reels/TikToks). Setup fee can be fully waived for eligible luxury venues via VIP hosting barter.

## Barter model

Venues can offset up to 50% of setup fees by providing complimentary room stays or tasting-menu access for Architech media shoots. Engagement models: full cash retainer, hybrid barter trade, or pure content exchange for eligible premium locations.

## Proof

Case study: pocketpizza.co.nz — an Auckland local business running a commission-free ordering site plus TikTok/Reels content. 0% commissions, <1s page load, 100% owned customer data, 250k+ organic video views.

## Pages

- [Home](https://architech.nz/): ROI calculator, packages, and intake form for a free 10-minute growth & content audit.

## Contact

Auckland, New Zealand. Book an audit via the intake form at https://architech.nz/#intake
